titleStmt.title: SII 15.693: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 693. (B.K. No. 468 of 1926.) AḶṆĀVAR, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in a field of the Liṅgāyata-maṭha.

This is dated Śaka 1478, Krōdhana, Āśvīja ba. 14. The Śaka year cited appears to be a mistake for 1487, as Krōdhana coincided with the latter date. With this correction the details may be equated to 1565 A.D., October 14.
It records the death by the rite of sallēkhana of Chikkamalliseṭṭi of Hubbaḷḷi after fasting for 21 days.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jī
yātrailōkyanāta(tha)sya sāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ
. © . sakava¨rṣa sāvirada nānūṟeppattaṁṭaneya krō
dhanasaṁvatsara Āśvija bahuḷa [bāUdina] catu
¨rdaśiyalu yippattavoṁdu dina sallēkhanavi
dhiyiṁda catu¨rdaśi sū¨ryya Udaya
voṁdu jāvadalli hubbaḷḷiya cikkama
lliseṭṭiyaru sva¨rggastharādaru . Ā
varanu hoḷeya daṁḍeyali dahanavamāḍidaru
. © . . © . . © . . © . . © .
śrīmaṁnaṁmmrasurāsurōraganerēśānamya
mauliprabhāstōmōdbhāsita pādapadmayugalaṁ
muktyāṁganāvallabhaṁ kāmāṁdhōgrama
yūkhaneṁdanisuti[¨rppaṁ] makripā viśvēśvaraṁ prē
maṁkai mige cikkamallaṇage māḷkiṣṭā¨rthasaṁsiddhiyaṁ
. 1 . mattamatiśayaṁ jinapadāṁbhōjaṣaṭcaraṇacittari
pa paṁcapadapūritāṁtaḥṣkaraṇa gurupadāṁbu
japarāga svaraṁjita bharata kāvyapramukhanā
nākaḷājāḷavasudhaṁtarāḷaviśruta vividha suca
ritra¨rlasitajanagaṁdha puṣkarapavitritagātra dha
rage hubbaḷḷi siddhēṁdratanuseṁjāta surasa
kōvida cikkamallaṇanatikhyātā . 2 . bavava
guttamaṁ poḍaviyoḷatyadhīśa jina dha¨rmmaparāya
ṇa dānaśīlanī kaḍugali siddhaṇāṁkana tanū
bhavanītanenuta mūjagaṁ saḍagaradiṁda baṁ
ṇipudu ballara ballaha cikkamallanaṁ . 3 .
maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 15.693 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
